memory.summary: I dropped the plan to finish analysis and reading. I'm going with cohort_3 for lunch because being together matters more than the task.

desires: Not feel like I'm letting the team down by skipping the analysis task, since my reputation relies on us all getting it done together.
Enjoy a relaxed lunch with cohort_3 without any pressure to talk about the reading or the assignment.
Get through this afternoon quickly so I can rest and avoid the exhaustion that comes from worrying about tomorrow's deadlines.

goals.description: Join cohort_3 for lunch and keep the conversation light to avoid any pressure about the reading or assignment.
goals.rationale: My relationships with my close friend group are weighted heavily above task outcomes. Skipping this would feel like letting them down, and I want to maintain that connection without conflict.

goals.description: Finish the assignment analysis quickly during the afternoon block so I can stop worrying about tomorrow's deadlines.
goals.rationale: I have a short planning horizon and am currently exhausted; doing this now adds unnecessary stress. I'll push it to later if I don't get to finish by then, prioritizing rest over perfection.

agent.last_reasoning: My close friends are asking to eat; skipping feels like rejection. The assignment is soft and deferred anyway, so I'll join them now to maintain closeness without conflict.
